model._hint: Base: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0. LoRA: linoyts/lora-xl-graffiti (DreamBooth, trained on 'graarg graffiti' images). Trained with madebyollin/sdxl-vae-fp16-fix; standard VAE may produce slightly different colours. ~6 GB SDXL + LoRA; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.

generation._hint: 30–50 steps. 30 is sufficient for LoRA styles. | CFG 5–9. 7.5 is a safe default. | SDXL native 1024×1024.

system._hint: ~6 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates graffiti-style illustrations — stylised lettering, spray paint textures, bold outlines, and the raw urban aesthetic of street art and murals.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: 'graarg graffiti' must appear in every prompt (trained token). Examples: 'graarg graffiti mural of a lion on a brick wall', 'graarg graffiti lettering spelling LOVE', 'graarg graffiti portrait of a woman, colorful spray paint'.
